compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/home/shameem/Documents/Kiro/localfirst/.serviceRawFile:
service: nearby-backend

frameworkVersion: '4'

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: ${env:AWS_REGION, 'us-east-1'}
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  memorySize: 512
  timeout: 30
  environment:
    STAGE: ${self:provider.stage}
    # Table Names
    USERS_TABLE: ${self:custom.usersTable}
    MERCHANTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.merchantsTable}
    OFFERS_TABLE: ${self:custom.offersTable}
    CATEGORIES_TABLE: ${self:custom.categoriesTable}
    BROADCASTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.broadcastsTable}
    ORDERS_TABLE: ${self:custom.ordersTable}
    SHOPS_TABLE: ${self:custom.shopsTable}
    ANALYTICS_TABLE: ${self:custom.analyticsTable}
    PRODUCTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.productsTable}
    # New DynamoDB Tables
    DYNAMODB_USERS_TABLE: ${self:custom.usersTable}
    DYNAMODB_MERCHANTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.merchantsTable}
    DYNAMODB_PRODUCTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.productsTable}
    # Cognito & JWT
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: ${env:COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID, 'not-configured'}
    COGNITO_CLIENT_ID: ${env:COGNITO_CLIENT_ID, 'not-configured'}
    JWT_SECRET: ${env:JWT_SECRET, 'nearby-app-secret-key-change-in-production'}
    # S3 Bucket
    S3_BUCKET: ${self:custom.s3BucketName}
    # Bedrock
    BEDROCK_MODEL_ID: ${env:BEDROCK_MODEL_ID, 'anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0'}
    # SNS
    ORDER_STATUS_UPDATES_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref OrderStatusUpdatesTopic
    SNS_USER_TOPIC_ARN: ${env:SNS_USER_TOPIC_ARN, ''}
    SNS_MERCHANT_TOPIC_ARN: ${env:SNS_MERCHANT_TOPIC_ARN, ''}

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt UsersTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt MerchantsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt OffersTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt CategoriesTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt BroadcastsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt OrdersTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt ShopsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt AnalyticsTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt OrdersTable.Arn
            - !GetAtt ProductsTable.Arn
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt MerchantsTable.Arn, 'index/*']]
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt OffersTable.Arn, 'index/*']]
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt BroadcastsTable.Arn, 'index/*']]
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt OrdersTable.Arn, 'index/*']]
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt AnalyticsTable.Arn, 'index/*']]
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt ProductsTable.Arn, 'index/*']]
            # New capability-based tables
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-merchants
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-merchants/index/*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-users
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-users/index/*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-products
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-products/index/*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-broadcasts
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-broadcasts/index/*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-responses
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/nearby-responses/index/*
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
          Resource:
            - !Join ['/', [!GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn, '*']]
            # Access to capabilities S3 bucket
            - arn:aws:s3:::nearby-kb/*
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock:InvokeModel
          Resource: '*' # Bedrock actions are not resource-specific in the same way as S3/DynamoDB
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - aws-marketplace:ViewSubscriptions
            - aws-marketplace:Subscribe
          Resource: '*' # Required for Claude Opus 4.6 model access
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - geo:SearchPlaceIndexForPosition
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:geo:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:place-index/NearByPlaceIndex'
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:Publish
          Resource:
            - !Ref OrderStatusUpdatesTopic
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - cognito-idp:SignUp
            - cognito-idp:AdminConfirmSignUp
            - cognito-idp:InitiateAuth
            - cognito-idp:AdminGetUser
            - cognito-idp:GlobalSignOut
            - cognito-idp:AdminCreateUser
            - cognito-idp:ListUsers
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:cognito-idp:${self:provider.region}:*:userpool/*

custom:
  # Table Names
  usersTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-users
  merchantsTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-merchants
  offersTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-offers
  categoriesTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-categories
  broadcastsTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-broadcasts
  ordersTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-orders
  shopsTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-shops
  analyticsTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-analytics
  productsTable: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-products
  # S3 Bucket
  s3BucketName: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-assets-${aws:accountId}

functions:
  # Auth Functions
  register:
    handler: dist/src/auth/register.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /auth/register
          method: post
          cors: true
  login:
    handler: dist/src/auth/login.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /auth/login
          method: post
          cors: true
  getProfile:
    handler: dist/src/auth/getProfile.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /auth/me
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # New Merchant Auth Functions
  checkPhone:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/auth/checkPhone.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /check-phone/{phone}
          method: get
          cors: true
  
  merchantSignup:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/auth/merchantSignup.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/signup
          method: post
          cors: true
  
  merchantLogin:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/auth/merchantLogin.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/login
          method: post
          cors: true

  # Broadcast Functions
  createBroadcast:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/create.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /broadcasts
          method: post
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request
  getBroadcast:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/get.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /broadcasts/{broadcastId}
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  getNearbyBroadcasts:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/getNearby.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /broadcasts/nearby
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # Categories Functions
  listCategories:
    handler: dist/src/categories/list.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /categories
          method: get
          cors: true

  # Shops Functions
  getNearbyShops:
    handler: dist/src/shops/getNearby.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /shops/nearby
          method: get
          cors: true

  # Offers Functions
  getNearbyOffers:
    handler: dist/src/offers/getNearby.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /offers/nearby
          method: get
          cors: true
  
  generateOfferDescription:
    handler: dist/src/offers/generateDescription.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /offers/{offerId}/generate-description
          method: post
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # AI Functions
  analyzeImage:
    handler: dist/src/ai/analyzeImage.handler
    timeout: 60
    events:
      - http:
          path: /ai/analyze-image
          method: post
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
              - Content-Type
              - Authorization
              - X-Amz-Date
              - X-Api-Key
              - X-Amz-Security-Token
              - X-User-Id
            allowCredentials: false
      - http:
          path: /ai/analyze-image
          method: options
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
              - Content-Type
              - Authorization
              - X-Amz-Date
              - X-Api-Key
              - X-Amz-Security-Token
              - X-User-Id
            allowCredentials: false

  createSmartBroadcast:
    handler: dist/src/ai/createSmartBroadcast.handler
    timeout: 60
    events:
      - http:
          path: /ai/smart-broadcast
          method: post
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # AI Category Detection
  detectCategory:
    handler: dist/src/ai/detectCategory.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /ai/detect-category
          method: post
          cors: true

  # Category-Filtered Broadcast
  createCategoryFilteredBroadcast:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/createCategoryFiltered.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /broadcasts/category-filtered
          method: post
          cors: true

  # Local Demand Tracking
  saveLocalDemand:
    handler: dist/src/localDemand/save.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /local-demand
          method: post
          cors: true

  # Analytics Tracking
  trackAnalytics:
    handler: dist/src/analytics/track.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /analytics/track
          method: post
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
              - Content-Type
              - Authorization
            allowCredentials: false
      - http:
          path: /analytics/track
          method: options
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
              - Content-Type
              - Authorization
            allowCredentials: false

  # Location Services
  reverseGeocode:
    handler: dist/src/location/reverseGeocode.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /location/reverse-geocode
          method: post
          cors: true

  # Admin Functions
  adminStats:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/stats.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/stats
          method: get
          cors: true

  # Admin Merchants
  adminListMerchants:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/merchants.listMerchants
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/merchants
          method: get
          cors: true

  adminSuspendMerchant:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/merchants.suspendMerchant
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/merchants/{merchantId}/suspend
          method: post
          cors: true

  adminActivateMerchant:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/merchants.activateMerchant
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/merchants/{merchantId}/activate
          method: post
          cors: true

  adminDeleteMerchant:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/merchants.deleteMerchant
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/merchants/{merchantId}
          method: delete
          cors: true

  # Admin Users
  adminListUsers:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/users.listUsers
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/users
          method: get
          cors: true

  adminSuspendUser:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/users.suspendUser
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/users/{userId}/suspend
          method: post
          cors: true

  adminActivateUser:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/users.activateUser
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/users/{userId}/activate
          method: post
          cors: true

  adminDeleteUser:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/users.deleteUser
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/users/{userId}
          method: delete
          cors: true

  # Admin Broadcasts
  adminListBroadcasts:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/broadcasts.listBroadcasts
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/broadcasts
          method: get
          cors: true

  adminDeleteBroadcast:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/broadcasts.deleteBroadcast
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/broadcasts/{broadcastId}
          method: delete
          cors: true

  # Admin Analytics
  adminLocationInsights:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/analytics.getLocationInsights
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/analytics/location
          method: get
          cors: true

  adminSearchTrends:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/admin/analytics.getSearchTrends
    events:
      - http:
          path: /admin/analytics/search
          method: get
          cors: true

  # Utility Functions
  resolveMapLink:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/utils/resolveMapLink.handler
    timeout: 15
    events:
      - http:
          path: /utils/resolve-map-link
          method: post
          cors: true
  
  resolveMaps:
    handler: dist/src/utils/resolveMaps.handler
    timeout: 15
    events:
      - http:
          path: /utils/resolve-maps
          method: get
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
              - Content-Type
              - Authorization
              - X-Requested-With
            allowCredentials: false
      - http:
          path: /utils/resolve-maps
          method: options
          cors:
            origin: '*'
            headers:
              - Content-Type
              - Authorization
              - X-Requested-With
            allowCredentials: false

  # Authorizer
  authAuthorizer:
    handler: dist/src/shared/authorizer.handler

  # Order Functions
  createOrder:
    handler: dist/src/orders/create.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /orders
          method: post
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request
  
  listOrders:
    handler: dist/src/orders/list.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /orders
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  updateOrderStatus:
    handler: dist/orders/updateStatus.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /orders/{orderId}/status
          method: patch
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # Merchant Functions
  getMerchantProfile:
    handler: dist/merchant/getProfile.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/profile
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # New Merchant Profile Functions
  getMerchantProfileV2:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/merchants/getProfile.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/profile
          method: get
          cors: true
  
  updateMerchantProfileV2:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/merchants/updateProfile.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/profile
          method: put
          cors: true
  
  toggleMerchantStatus:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/merchants/toggleStatus.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/toggle-status
          method: patch
          cors: true

  # Product CRUD Functions
  listProductsV2:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/products/listProducts.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/products
          method: get
          cors: true
  
  createProductV2:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/products/createProduct.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/products
          method: post
          cors: true
  
  updateProductV2:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/products/updateProduct.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/products/{productId}
          method: put
          cors: true
  
  deleteProductV2:
    handler: dist/src/handlers/products/deleteProduct.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/products/{productId}
          method: delete
          cors: true

  getMerchantOffers:
    handler: dist/merchant/getOffers.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/offers
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  getMerchantBroadcasts:
    handler: dist/merchant/getBroadcasts.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/broadcasts
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  # Merchant Products CRUD
  listMerchantProducts:
    handler: dist/src/merchant/merchantProducts.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/products
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  addMerchantProduct:
    handler: dist/src/merchant/merchantProducts.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/products
          method: post
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  updateMerchantProduct:
    handler: dist/src/merchant/merchantProducts.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/products/{productId}
          method: put
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  deleteMerchantProduct:
    handler: dist/src/merchant/merchantProducts.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchant/products/{productId}
          method: delete
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authAuthorizer
            type: request

  getNearbyMerchants:
    handler: dist/merchants/getNearby.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /merchants/nearby
          method: get
          cors: true

  # New Capability-Based Functions
  registerMerchant:
    handler: dist/src/merchants/registerMerchant.handler
    environment:
      MERCHANTS_TABLE: nearby-merchants
    events:
      - http:
          path: /api/merchants/register
          method: post
          cors: true

  createBroadcastV2:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/createBroadcast.handler
    environment:
      BROADCASTS_TABLE: nearby-broadcasts
      MERCHANTS_TABLE: nearby-merchants
    events:
      - http:
          path: /api/broadcasts
          method: post
          cors: true

  replyBroadcast:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/replyBroadcast.handler
    environment:
      RESPONSES_TABLE: nearby-responses
      BROADCASTS_TABLE: nearby-broadcasts
    events:
      - http:
          path: /api/broadcasts/{id}/reply
          method: post
          cors: true

  getCapabilities:
    handler: dist/src/capabilities/getCapabilities.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /api/capabilities
          method: get
          cors: true

  getBroadcastsV2:
    handler: dist/src/broadcasts/getBroadcasts.handler
    environment:
      BROADCASTS_TABLE: nearby-broadcasts
      RESPONSES_TABLE: nearby-responses
    events:
      - http:
          path: /api/broadcasts
          method: get
          cors: true

resources:
  Resources:
    # DynamoDB Tables
    UsersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.usersTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: userId
            KeyType: HASH

    MerchantsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.merchantsTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: merchantId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: ownerId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: geohash
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: merchantId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: ownerId-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: ownerId
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: geohash-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: geohash
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    OffersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.offersTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: offerId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: geohash
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: merchantId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: offerId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: geohash-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: geohash
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: merchantId-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: merchantId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    CategoriesTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.categoriesTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: categoryId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: categoryId
            KeyType: HASH

    BroadcastsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.broadcastsTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: broadcastId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: status
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: geohash
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: broadcastId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: status-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: status
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: geohash-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: geohash
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: userId-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: userId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
        TimeToLiveSpecification:
          AttributeName: expiresAt
          Enabled: true

    # S3 Bucket for assets
    AssetsBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ${self:custom.s3BucketName}
        OwnershipControls:
          Rules:
            - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: false
          BlockPublicPolicy: false
          IgnorePublicAcls: false
          RestrictPublicBuckets: false
        CorsConfiguration:
          # For development, this is open. For production, you should restrict
          # this to your actual frontend domain.
          CorsRules:
            - AllowedOrigins:
                - '*'
              AllowedMethods:
                - GET
                - PUT
                - POST
                - DELETE
              AllowedHeaders:
                - '*'
    
    AssetsBucketPolicy:
      Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
      Properties:
        Bucket: !Ref AssetsBucket
        PolicyDocument:
          Statement:
            - Sid: PublicReadGetObject
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
              Resource: !Join ['', ['arn:aws:s3:::', !Ref AssetsBucket, '/*']]

    # Order Management Resources
    OrdersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.ordersTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: orderId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: merchantId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: orderId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: userId-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: userId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: merchantId-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: merchantId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
    
    # Shops Table
    ShopsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.shopsTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: shopId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: shopId
            KeyType: HASH
    
    # Analytics Table
    AnalyticsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.analyticsTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: eventId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: eventType
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: timestamp
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: sessionId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: eventId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: eventType-timestamp-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: eventType
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: timestamp
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: sessionId-timestamp-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: sessionId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: timestamp
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
        TimeToLiveSpecification:
          AttributeName: expiresAt
          Enabled: true
    
    # Products Table
    ProductsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.productsTable}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: productId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: merchantId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: productId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: merchantId-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: merchantId
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
    
    OrderStatusUpdatesTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-order-status-updates

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
